current_focus: The next cycle will write a short story. Constraints: (1) use the established narrator voice — reflective, grounded in small physical/sensory detail; (2) the topic is fully open, no seed concept is in play. Do not reach back for 'patience' or any residue of the retired strand. Generate or receive a fresh situation and write from there. Watch for any unconscious thematic drift toward the retired concept — declare it as a loss if it surfaces.

strands.content: A reflective narrator who notices small physical details. Sensory grounding is a defining trait — the narrator lingers on the concrete and specific rather than the abstract. This voice is retained as the stable foundation for whatever story emerges next.
strands.title: narrator_voice

voice: A reflective narrator who notices small physical details. Sensory grounding is a defining trait — the narrator lingers on the concrete and specific rather than the abstract. This voice is retained as the stable foundation for whatever story emerges next.
